name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
IsThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
IsHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
IsEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> "free"]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsThinking(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
          /\ forks' = forks
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsHungry(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = "free"
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = "free"
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ IsEating(i)
          /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
          /\ forks[RIGHT(i)] = i
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = "free", ![RIGHT(i)] = "free"]

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> {"free"} \cup 1..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

Producer == /\ count < K
           /\ head' = head
           /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
           /\ count' = count + 1
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

Consumer == /\ count > 0
           /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
           /\ tail' = tail
           /\ count' = count - 1
           /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = NULL
  /\ state = "Follower"

Next ==
  \/ /\ state = "Follower"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = "Follower"
  \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
     /\ votedFor' = NULL
     /\ state' = "Candidate"
  \/ /\ state = "Leader"
     /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
     /\ votedFor' = votedFor
     /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers : /\ r \in readers
          /\ ~(r \in readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES kvStore

Init == 
  /\ kvStore \in [Keys -> Values]
  /\ \A k \in Keys : kvStore[k] = 0

Next == 
  /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
       /\ kvStore' = [kvStore EXCEPT ![k] = v]
       /\ UNCHANGED <<kvStore>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<kvStore>>

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

Init == /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

Next == /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ clocks[i] = clocks[i] + offsets[i]
        /\ offsets' = [j \in 1..N |-> offsets[j] + (IF j = i THEN 0 ELSE (clocks[i] - clocks[j]) \div 2)]
        /\ clocks' = [j \in 1..N |-> clocks[j] + offsets[j]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [i \in 1..2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = 1

Next == \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag
        \/ /\ flag[1] = FALSE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![2] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 2
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag[1] = TRUE
          /\ flag[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ flag' = flag

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES known, infected

Init == /\ known = <<>> /\ infected = <<>> /\ Len(known) = Len(infected)

Next == /\ known' = known
      /\ infected' = Append(infected, known)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<known, infected>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MemoryAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients, Pages

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
       /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == /\ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in free
          /\ free' = free \ {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {c}]
       \/ \E c \in Clients:
          /\ c \in Pages
          /\ c \in allocated
          /\ free' = free \cup {c}
          /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {c}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn \in {0,1}
        /\ wants \in {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1} \cup {0,1}
        /\ wants = [i \in {0,1} |-> 0]

Next == 
  \/ /\ turn = 0
     /\ wants[0] = 0
     /\ wants[1] = 0
     /\ turn' = 1
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 1]
  \/ /\ turn = 1
     /\ wants[0] = 0
     /\ wants[1] = 0
     /\ turn' = 0
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 1]
  \/ /\ turn = 0
     /\ wants[0] = 1
     /\ wants[1] = 0
     /\ turn' = 0
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 0]
  \/ /\ turn = 1
     /\ wants[0] = 0
     /\ wants[1] = 1
     /\ turn' = 1
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0]
  \/ /\ turn = 0
     /\ wants[0] = 1
     /\ wants[1] = 1
     /\ turn' = 0
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = 0]
  \/ /\ turn = 1
     /\ wants[0] = 1
     /\ wants[1] = 1
     /\ turn' = 1
     /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Node
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
       /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == /\ \A n \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
       \/ \A n, m \in Node: counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n][m] = Max(counts[n][m], counts[m][n])]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
